query:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'storage_fallback' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS storage_fallback_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS background_completed_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'google_drive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS google_drive_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'sheet_write_failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sheet_write_failed_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS background_failed_rows
FROM station_tasks
WHERE stationCode = 'E'
  AND stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') IS NOT NULL;

SELECT st.id AS task_id,
       p.batchNo AS batch_no,
       st.completedAt AS completed_at,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS e_photo_sync_message,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) AS e_front_photo_url,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) AS e_back_photo_url
FROM station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId
WHERE st.stationCode = 'E'
  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'storage_fallback'
ORDER BY st.completedAt ASC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27YhjuzT1vAAGri.3f5f101aaba8 --database F4LQWhZd9GGdmJuBm98r2c --execute SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'storage_fallback' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS storage_fallback_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS background_completed_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'google_drive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS google_drive_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'sheet_write_failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sheet_write_failed_rows,
       SUM(CASE WHEN JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_failed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS background_failed_rows
FROM station_tasks
WHERE stationCode = 'E'
  AND stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus') IS NOT NULL;

SELECT st.id AS task_id,
       p.batchNo AS batch_no,
       st.completedAt AS completed_at,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS e_photo_sync_status,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS e_photo_sync_message,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) AS e_front_photo_url,
       JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) AS e_back_photo_url
FROM station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.productId
WHERE st.stationCode = 'E'
  AND st.stationTaskStatus = 'completed'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'storage_fallback'
ORDER BY st.completedAt ASC;
